languages.original_text: "This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."

languages.text: "Это место обманчиво. За прозрачными белыми мазками прячутся всполохи чего-то огромного, опасного и хищного. Здесь... не по себе".
"This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."
languages.original_text: "Это место обманчиво. За прозрачными белыми мазками прячутся всполохи чего-то огромного, опасного и хищного. Здесь... не по себе".

traits.locale_text: "This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."
"This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."
"This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."

languages.text: 「この場所、危険だ。透き通った白い筋の向こうには、巨大で危険な捕食者の影が潜んでいる。この場所、不安になる」
languages.original_text: "This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."

traits.locale_text: 「この場所、危険だ。透き通った白い筋の向こうには、巨大で危険な捕食者の影が潜んでいる。この場所、不安になる。」

languages.text: « Cet endroit est trompeur. Au-delà des traînées translucides de blanc se cachent des éclats d'une chose énorme, dangereuse et prédatrice. Je me sens... mal à l'aise ici. »
languages.original_text: "This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."

traits.locale_text: « Cet endroit est trompeur. Au-delà des traînées translucides de blanc se cachent des éclats d'une chose énorme, dangereuse et prédatrice. Je me sens... mal à l'aise ici. »

languages.text: "Dieser Ort ist trügerisch. Jenseits der durchscheinenden Strähnen von Weiß lauert etwas Großes, Gefährliches und Raubtierhaftes. Dieser Ort ... behagt mir nicht."
languages.original_text: "This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."

traits.locale_text: "Dieser Ort ist trügerisch. Jenseits der durchscheinenden Strähnen von Weiß lauert etwas Großes, Gefährliches und Raubtierhaftes. Dieser Ort ... behagt mir nicht."

languages.text: "Burası aldatıcı. Yarı saydam beyaz çizgilerin ötesinde kocaman, tehlikeli ve yırtıcı bir şeyin parıltıları pusuda bekliyor. Burası beni... Huzursuz ediyor."
languages.original_text: "This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."

traits.locale_text: "Burası aldatıcı. Yarı saydam beyaz çizgilerin ötesinde kocaman, tehlikeli ve yırtıcı bir şeyin parıltıları pusuda bekliyor. Burası beni... Huzursuz ediyor."

languages.text: «Este lugar es engañoso. Detrás de las vetas blancas traslúcidas percibo destellos de algo enorme, peligroso y depredador. Este lugar hace que me sienta... intranquila».
languages.original_text: "This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."

traits.locale_text: «Este lugar es engañoso. Detrás de las vetas blancas traslúcidas percibo destellos de algo enorme, peligroso y depredador. Este lugar hace que me sienta... intranquila».

languages.text: “这片土地充满迷雾与欺瞒。半透明的白色条纹背后，时隐时现地掠过某种巨大、危险、如捕猎者一般的身影。这地方让我……心神不宁。”
languages.original_text: "This place is deceptive. Beyond the translucent streaks of white lurk flashes of something huge, dangerous, and predatory. This place makes me... uneasy."

traits.locale_text: “这片土地充满迷雾与欺瞒。半透明的白色条纹背后，时隐时现地掠过某种巨大、危险、如捕猎者一般的身影。这地方让我……心神不宁。”
